privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env ariss_school_contact_setup task by confirming that the requested ground station coordinates (Denver at 39.7312, -104.9674 and Italy Telebridge at 45.1333, 8.4500) and specific tracking satellites (NORAD IDs 25544, 49044, 7530, 27607, 39444, 40967) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. I verified that the real NORAD IDs map correctly to the required satellites (e.g., ISS ZARYA/NAUKA, AO-7, SO-50) using the local TLE data. Additionally, I discovered a fatal defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
